title: Tinkers Focus
description: A pack designed to force players to learn and use 1.12.2 tinkers construct.
body:
# Tinkers Focus!
Tinkers Focus is a pack designed to force players to use and understand 1.12.2 tinker construct.

The pack removes the recipes for vanilla tools and leaves it up to the players to think around how to get better tools.

With a few other mod sprinkled in this pack is sure to give ya a good time (if you like tinkers)
